description: Composition Empire waist dress made of cotton, polyester and spandex blended fabric, has three quarter length sleeves, wrap-over top, open ended tucks at the waist and floral print Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash delicate Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Use cool iron arrow woman caters to fashionistas with a taste for the exotic. This dress with its color-happy, mood lifting hues is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with a vibrant scarf and sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
